name: Kalbi Kui-Broiled Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ribs into 2-1/2" x 2-inch pieces and score the surfaces.
2. Combine the marinade ingredients in a bowl and soak the ribs for 1-2 hours.
3. Place the ribs on a cold broiler pan and broil on the middle rack for 10-12 minutes on each side, or until they reach the desired doneness.
4. For extra flavor, use generous amounts of garlic and ginger.
5. Ensure the short ribs are sliced very thin (1/4-inch or less) for even cooking.
6. Broil over hot coals for best results.
7. This dish is a favorite island picnic item. Aloha Chris.
